title: Liang Wenfeng of DeepSeek on Open Source: Only Make 6 Times Profit, No Overtime; Want to Make 100 Times, Then You Will Be Constrained by Open Source
excerpt: Recently, internal conversation content from DeepSeek's investor exchange session was leaked. Founder Liang Wenfeng gave a complete explanation of the underlyin
content_html:
Recently, internal conversation content from DeepSeek's investor exchange session was leaked. Founder Liang Wenfeng gave a complete explanation of the underlying logic behind the open-source strategy. He clearly stated, "We will definitely open-source, and even the strongest models will be open-sourced," as he could not see any inevitable benefits of keeping it closed-source. This is the first time he explained the relationship between open-source and commercial profits from a financial perspective.

Open-sourcing does not affect 6x profit, but it may restrict 100x profit

Liang Wenfeng provided a clear financial logic: with a return on investment within ten months, which corresponds to about six times the profit, open-sourcing has no impact on the business model. However, if the goal is to make 100 times the profit, open-sourcing can have an impact because third parties can independently deploy the open-source model, achieving the same results at one-twentieth of the cost, thus reducing pricing power. He defined the six times profit as DeepSeek's "disciplined" strategy, believing this is a way for the company to last longer and gain more opportunities in technological evolution, thereby increasing the probability of achieving AGI.

The medium scale is the "sweet spot," which others cannot easily copy

sentences.en: Recently, internal conversation content from DeepSeek's investor exchange session was leaked.
sentences.zh: 近日，DeepSeek投资者交流会内部谈话内容被泄露。

sentences.en: Founder Liang Wenfeng gave a complete explanation of the underlying logic behind the open-source strategy.
sentences.zh: 创始人梁文峰完整阐释了开源战略背后的底层逻辑。

sentences.en: He clearly stated, "We will definitely open-source, and even the strongest models will be open-sourced," as he could not see any inevitable benefits of keeping it closed-source.
sentences.zh: 他明确表示，“我们一定会开源，即使是最强大的模型也会开源”，因为他看不到保持闭源有任何必然的好处。

sentences.en: This is the first time he explained the relationship between open-source and commercial profits from a financial perspective.
sentences.zh: 这是他第一次从财务角度解释开源与商业利润的关系。

sentences.zh: 开源不影响6倍利润，但可能限制100倍利润

However, if the goal is to make 100 times the profit, open-sourcing can have an impact because third parties can independently deploy the open-source model, achieving the same results at one-twentieth of the cost, thus reducing pricing power. He defined the six times profit as DeepSeek's "disciplined" strategy, believing this is a way for the company to last longer and gain more opportunities in technological evolution, thereby increasing the probability of achieving AGI.

sentences.en: Liang Wenfeng provided a clear financial logic: with a return on investment within ten months, which corresponds to about six times the profit, open-sourcing has no impact on the business model.
sentences.zh: 梁文峰给出了清晰的财务逻辑：十个月内即可收回投资，相当于利润的六倍左右，开源对商业模式没有影响。

sentences.en: However, if the goal is to make 100 times the profit, open-sourcing can have an impact because third parties can independently deploy the open-source model, achieving the same results at one-twentieth of the cost, thus reducing pricing power.
sentences.zh: 然而，如果目标是赚取100倍的利润，开源就会产生影响，因为第三方可以独立部署开源模型，以二十分之一的成本达到相同的结果，从而降低定价权。

sentences.en: He defined the six times profit as DeepSeek's "disciplined" strategy, believing this is a way for the company to last longer and gain more opportunities in technological evolution, thereby increasing the probability of achieving AGI.
sentences.zh: 他将六倍利润定义为DeepSeek的“纪律”策略，认为这是公司能够持续更长时间并在技术进化中获得更多机会的一种方式，从而增加实现AGI的概率。

blocks.html_en: The medium scale is the "sweet spot," which others cannot easily copy

sentences.en: The medium scale is the "sweet spot," which others cannot easily copy
sentences.zh: 中等规模是其他人无法轻易复制的“最佳点”

content_html_zh:
近日，DeepSeek投资者交流会内部谈话内容被泄露。 创始人梁文峰完整阐释了开源战略背后的底层逻辑。 他明确表示，“我们一定会开源，即使是最强大的模型也会开源”，因为他看不到保持闭源有任何必然的好处。 这是他第一次从财务角度解释开源与商业利润的关系。

开源不影响6倍利润，但可能限制100倍利润

梁文峰给出了清晰的财务逻辑：十个月内即可收回投资，相当于利润的六倍左右，开源对商业模式没有影响。 然而，如果目标是赚取100倍的利润，开源就会产生影响，因为第三方可以独立部署开源模型，以二十分之一的成本达到相同的结果，从而降低定价权。 他将六倍利润定义为DeepSeek的“纪律”策略，认为这是公司能够持续更长时间并在技术进化中获得更多机会的一种方式，从而增加实现AGI的概率。

中等规模是其他人无法轻易复制的“最佳点”
